findings.evidence: `rg -n "simply|Simply|theorem existsUnique" .../LiftingCriterion.lean` shows line 22 mentions simply-connected, while the only theorems are `existsUnique_continuousMap_lifts_of_range_le_subgroup` at line 54 and `existsUnique_continuousMap_lifts_of_subsingleton_source_subgroup` at line 66.
findings.fix: Either add the promised `SimplyConnectedSpace A` wrapper using `FundamentalGroup.map_range_le_of_simplyConnectedSpace`, or change the module docstring to say this file only provides the subsingleton-source specialization.
findings.issue: The module docstring says the file packages the subgroup criterion "together with the simply-connected-domain special case," but no `SimplyConnectedSpace` specialization is declared in this file.

summary: The module docstring overclaims the API added by this file: it says the file includes a simply-connected-domain special case, but the only specialization exposed here is the subsingleton fundamental-group version.
